Now, because of that, we're able to increase the income from that same 100 people who registered to $2,500. ## [03:00 - 05:49]

So giving us that $37.50. Now let's add on 33% increase in sales from non-registrants. So now our total income from the webinar is not $1,000. It's $5,000. Not bad. Now your results may differ.
